fn validate_age(_ age: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if age < 0
    Err("negative")
  else if age > 150
    Err("too-large")
  else
    Ok(age)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let cases = [-1, 25, 200]
  mut i = 0
  while i < cases.len()
    let a = match cases.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    match validate_age(a)
    when Ok(age)
      print("ok=#{age}")
    when Err(msg)
      print("err=#{msg}")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
